meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop hunting for project ideas. Learn how to architect high-value SaaS pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing generic project ideas. Instead, build a 'Pricing Engine as a Service.' By automating complex SaaS billing architectures—metered usage, tiered subscriptions, and dynamic discounting—you solve a massive pain point for B2B clients, ensuring your freelance output is high-leverage, highly profitable, and instantly deployable via AI-assisted coding.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a freelancer's most expensive enemy. You have the technical stack, the ambition, and the clients, but you lack the 'North Star' project that turns a one-off gig into a recurring revenue engine. The market isn't looking for another to-do list app; it is starved for robust, billing-integrated infrastructure.

By pivoting your focus toward SaaS pricing logic, you stop being a commodity coder and become an essential revenue architect. This guide leverages Antigravity and Claude Code to turn complex financial logic into modular, shippable micro-services that clients will pay a premium to own.

steps.title: Define the Revenue Model Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the billing hierarchy. We focus on multi-tenant structures that support both flat-fee and usage-based models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a schema for a multi-tenant SaaS billing system supporting tiered subscriptions and metered usage triggers. Include SQL models for Users, Subscriptions, and UsageRecords.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.sql --task 'normalize table relationships for high-concurrency billing'

steps.title: Build the Pricing Logic Engine
steps.description: Abstract your pricing logic into a standalone service to ensure it is decoupled from the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a TypeScript service class 'PricingEngine' that calculates monthly recurring revenue based on feature flags and usage thresholds.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Webhook Handlers
steps.description: Securely process subscription events to maintain sync between your database and the payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure Express.js route handler for Stripe webhooks that validates event signatures and updates user subscription status in the database.

steps.title: Develop Tiered Feature Gates
steps.description: Create a middleware layer to enforce pricing tiers across the application's API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a decorator function 'requireTier' that checks if the authenticated user has sufficient subscription level to access a specific feature.

steps.title: Automate Billing Analytics Export
steps.description: Provide clients with high-value reporting features that visualize their revenue growth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reporting module that aggregates daily usage records into a JSON format compatible with Chart.js to visualize MRR trends.

pro_tips: Always wrap your pricing logic in a 'dry-run' mode that logs calculations without writing to the DB for easier debugging.
Use UUIDs for all subscription IDs to prevent ID enumeration attacks in your API responses.
Implement a 'Grace Period' logic in your pricing engine to prevent immediate lockout during credit card expiration.
Cache subscription status in Redis to reduce database hits on high-traffic feature-gated endpoints.
Build a 'Pricing Simulator' UI component so clients can test new tier configurations before pushing to production.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing engine to a staging environment, run a load test on the webhook handler, and package the service as a reusable npm module for your future freelance projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the infrastructure that powers the world's most profitable software. Your expertise in revenue architecture makes you an invaluable asset. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
